meaning: n.怯懦,恐惧,臭味,恐怖vt.畏缩,害怕,使闻到臭味vi.惊恐,发出臭味
examples: I was at loose ends and in a funk.
She's really helped me out of the funk I was in.
Hip pop or funk music begins blaring from Club Paradiso and Club Melkweg.
The expensive disaster led the club into a six-year losing funk and attendance decline.
Her task: Help the Internet pioneer regain its stature after years in a financial funk.
